info.title: AsyncAPI Composition Torture Test
info.description: A deliberately broad rendering test for JSON Schema validation keywords (type, required, numeric/string/array/object constraints, enum, const, examples, if/then/else, readOnly, writeOnly, composition, and map/tuple keywords) across payloads, headers, objects, arrays, maps, refs, nested schemas, traits, and message examples.

production.description: Kafka broker used only for renderer testing.

accountEvents.title: Account Events Channel
accountEvents.description: Channel with messages that exercise schema composition keywords.

accountId.description: Account identifier with a oneOf parameter schema.

auditEvents.title: Audit Events Channel
auditEvents.description: Channel with allOf and anyOf heavy audit messages.

AccountEventMessage.name: AccountEventMessage
AccountEventMessage.title: Account event using message-level oneOf payload
AccountEventMessage.summary: Payload is exactly one of several event shapes.

ConditionalEventMessage.name: ConditionalEventMessage
ConditionalEventMessage.title: Event using if then else payload

CollectionEventMessage.name: CollectionEventMessage
CollectionEventMessage.title: Event using arrays with oneOf, anyOf, allOf, contains

AuditEventMessage.name: AuditEventMessage
AuditEventMessage.title: Audit event with deep nesting and maps

KeywordShowcaseMessage.name: KeywordShowcaseMessage
KeywordShowcaseMessage.title: Payload exercising every JSON Schema validation keyword
KeywordShowcaseMessage.summary: Single message whose payload schema includes type, required, numeric/string/array/object constraints, enum, const, examples, if/then/else, readOnly, writeOnly, properties, patternProperties, additionalProperties, additionalItems, items, propertyNames, contains, allOf, oneOf, anyOf, and not.

ComposedHeaders.title: ComposedHeaders
ComposedHeaders.description: allOf at headers root, oneOf and anyOf inside properties.

AccountEventEnvelope.title: AccountEventEnvelope
AccountEventEnvelope.description: allOf combines common metadata with exactly one event-specific shape.

oneOf.title: Account merged event with nested anyOf

records.description: Map values use anyOf, each branch may contain allOf or oneOf.

alwaysValid.description: Boolean true schema as a property schema.

impossibleValue.description: Boolean false schema using not with true.

SchemaKeywordShowcase.title: SchemaKeywordShowcase
SchemaKeywordShowcase.description: One schema tree that exercises every JSON Schema validation keyword supported in AsyncAPI payloads.

NestedEverything.title: NestedEverything
NestedEverything.description: Deeply nested oneOf, anyOf, allOf, and if/then/else in one schema.
